steps.title: Sort the data and identify the two middle values
steps.content:
The data set is: 6, 12, 20, 6, 6, 7, 8, 7
Sorted: 6, 6, 6, 7, 7, 8, 12, 20
With 8 values, the middle positions (4th and 5th) are both 7.

steps.title: Calculate the median
steps.content:
The median of an even-sized data set is the average of the two middle values.
$$\text{Median} = \frac{7 + 7}{2} = 7$$
That matches Choice B — $7$.
